title: Second headset connected with the mobile app
scenario: Second headset connected to Poly Studio Mobile app does not display accurate data on Inventory, Device User, Mobile Profile, and Device Profile pages when first headset is already registered on Lens tenant
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure a first headset is already registered on the Lens tenant and connected to the app.
3. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the first headset is displayed.
4. Pair and connect a second headset to the mobile device via Bluetooth.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and confirm the second headset appears in the device list.
6. Navigate to the Inventory page (via Account → Lens → Inventory).
7. Verify the second headset appears on the Inventory page with accurate data: name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
8. Navigate to the Device User / Mobile User page (via Account → Lens → Device User).
9. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
10. Navigate to the Mobile Profile page (via Account → Lens → Mobile Profile).
11. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
12. Navigate to the Device Profile page (via Account → Lens → Device Profile).
13. Verify the second headset appears with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
expected: The second headset appears correctly on the Inventory page, Device User/Mobile User page, Mobile Profile page, and Device Profile page with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
